The artist banner displays the profile picture, name, global ranking, country, gender/pronouns, and whether they’re a solo artist or part of a group. It also shows a row of tags covering genres, moods, and themes (such as pop styles, emotional tones, or activities). Additional options like playing music, comparing artists, and setting custom alerts are also available.

When you click “Read More,” the modal expands to show a larger set of genre and mood tags (including subgenres, emotions, and themes) and a full written biography. The bio provides details on the artist’s career achievements, chart positions, albums, notable performances, and collaborations, as well as recent releases or highlights.

Create an Artist Shortlist

The Artist List feature on Chartmetric is a powerful discovery and filtering engine designed to help users discover artists across 12.5 million profiles using a combination of artist metadata, performance metrics, growth indicators, and audience demographics. It provides a highly customizable interface where users can apply filters based on attributes such as genre, language, debut date, or label affiliation; platform-specific metrics from Spotify, TikTok, YouTube, and social media; as well as detailed audience insights like gender, age group, and geographic reach. Users can choose to highlight either current values, absolute growth, or percentage change over selectable time periods (7, 28, or 60 days), and sort artists accordingly to identify fast-rising talent, emerging trends, or established stars.
This feature enables deep discovery by allowing users to stack multiple filters to build hyper-targeted artist segments—for example, finding independent Hispanic artists trending on TikTok, or identifying female-led pop artists with fast-growing Spotify monthly listeners in Europe. Every column in the table is sortable, and users can customize which metrics to display, making it easy to surface artists who match specific strategic, marketing, or A&R objectives. By combining real-time data visibility with dynamic filtering and sorting capabilities, the Artist List (Discovery) feature becomes a central hub for talent scouting, market analysis, and opportunity identification across the global music landscape.
